chatter: The perfect world is shaped by my hand.
Enough chatter. We have business to attend to.
Follow my lead, dears. The punishment for defiance is quite severe.
I'll accept nothing less than your best performance out there.
Let's tend to this quickly, shall we? Wasted time is not among the luxuries I can afford.
Look sharp. I will not keep improper company.
Work hard for me, dears. I'll be rewarding my favorites!
Do look lively, Vaswani. Two architechs on a battlefront are bound to make headlines. (with Symmetra on the team)
Well, aren't we a competent collective? (with Lifeweaver , Symmetra , and Vendetta on the team)
If you wish to succeed, then look the part.
Let's rile up the competition, shall we?
Mind your posture, everyone.
Shall we serve their loss on a silver platter?
Someone call my driver. We'll be finished here soon enough.
Victory always finds its way to me, somehow.
I've no intention of losing here. Neither should you.
Let's all do better this time, dears.
Should we fail now, it will be your necks on the line.
Still some OFIs for you all, apparently.
Ah, the final round. And a memorable one, I hope.
Consider this your last chance to impress me.
"Last round", you say? Oh, I hardly noticed...
A problem with the method, no doubt.
Charlatans, the lot of them!
Hmm. Perhaps still room for refinement.
I must reassess the situation.
I refuse to abide wrongful termination.
I will not be cast out like common refuse!
I will teach them a lesson in failure.
I'll be making some calls about this.
I'll draw up a new proposal.
I've no room for error.
No mistakes, only progress.
They insult me at their own peril.
They must be held responsible!
This cannot stain my record...
I am quite short on allies...
Imprudent to go in alone, I suspect.
Ugh, my compatriots are slacking!
Where are my reinforcements?
Divine perfection!
I am on fire.
I'm glowing, aren't I?
Positively radiant!
This is brilliance!
Unsurpassable.
I have such impeccable taste.
What a charming accessory.
High time for a change.
Now, my true plan unfolds.
What can I say? I'm a woman of taste.
Ah, much better.
*relaxed sigh* How refreshing.
Rejuvenating!
How good of you.
Just when I needed you.
Keep that up, and you'll merit a reward.
*chuckles* I will humiliate them.
Now to make some enemies.
Power enough to bring them down.
Damnable!
How abhorrent!
Unacceptable!
I wasn't finished.
They won't be rid of me that easily.
Our enemy's been revived.
They've revived someone!
Ally Ultimate Remark
Oh, you shouldn't have.
I define success.
call-outs: Shall we shame them, you think?
Steady on! We've nearly done it!
Pick up the pace! We don't have all day.
Time's almost up! Why is no one in a rush?
eliminations: Aw, ineptitude just can't be helped.
Don't fret, your severance is quite generous.
Log that as "sick leave", will you?
Someone didn't bother with risk assessment.
Time away will do you good.
Your lack of skill is impressive!
*sigh* The consequences of forsaking your fortune. (eliminating Ashe or Lifeweaver )
I have no need for redundancies. (eliminating another Domina )
I've no time for folly. (eliminating Hazard , Junkrat , Juno , Venture or Wuyang )
*laughs* What's a queen to an entrepreneur? (eliminating Junker Queen )
Dominion to she who deserves it. (eliminating Junker Queen or Vendetta )
Save the upward feedback. (eliminating Lifeweaver or Symmetra )
Oh, keep it down, would you? (eliminating Lúcio )
A weak link in the chain of command. (eliminating Sojourn )
Is a demotion in order? (eliminating Symmetra )
That will be reflected in your performance review. (eliminating Symmetra )
Truly devastated to lose you. (eliminating Symmetra )
Oh, a shame to part on such poor terms... (eliminating Vendetta )
Nothing personal, darling. Just business! (eliminating Vendetta )
Aww. Not so sound as a pound!
I'm pushing you to be better.
Was that a caged bird singing? (eliminating Bastion )
You can't jailbreak me, dear. (eliminating Sombra while Hacked)
Not faster than my light. (eliminating Tracer )
*chuckles* You're trying to make me sweat, aren't you? (on low HP)
Was that your best effort? (eliminating an enemy using ultimate ability)
You ought to let that bodyguard go. (eliminating Ashe using B.O.B.)
They'll idolize anyone these days... (eliminating Lúcio on Paraíso )
The revolution, silenced! (eliminating Lúcio on Paraíso )
My firewalls are impenetrable. (eliminating Sombra using EMP)
Never turn your back on me, darling. (eliminating Symmetra or Vendetta with back turned away)
Just making personnel adjustments, darling. (eliminating a Talon member with Vendetta on team)
That desperate to get me alone, are we? (unknown trigger)
I am of a higher caliber.
Ah! And not a hair out of place.
I'll have my people clean that up.
I will have order! (on low HP)
Have they all died? Oh, dear...
I do enjoy a hostile takeover.
Look at us, truly in lockstep!
They ought to consider a retrospective.
Retaliation? I wouldn't dream of it.
Revenge looks lovely on me, doesn't it?
Thrilled we circled back on this.
Certainly can't afford to lose you.
You'd be history without me, wouldn't you?
Connections, darling. Aren't they wonderful? (saving Vendetta )
Look what you've made me do!
Waste of a perfectly good manicure.
Aw, quite a tumble! Poor thing.
Falling rather short of your KPIs, it seems.
Oh, no, dear. Did you trip?
Go on, take a dip. (on Rialto )
Their turret's been taken care of.
Are you trying to impress me?
Such talent! I must know your hiring fee. (to all heroes excluding Lúcio )
And to think you waste that talent on shrubs, Niran. (to Lifeweaver )
interactions: Domina : Oh, another one of Marzia 's lackeys. Let's hope you're not as dim as the rest. Emre : You're insulting me? In those shoes? Domina : Darling! These cost more than fifty of you. Emre : Guess you can't buy good taste.

Domina : I'm quite capable of defending you out there, dear. But... should I? Freja : Wouldn't your "partner" want you to protect her assets? Domina : I expect she'd much prefer I test their resilience. Freja : Another test from Talon? *feigned gasp* What a surprise....

Domina : Oh, how I envy those solar threads in your hair. A pity I had to settle for twenty-four carat. Illari : It is not a fashion statement. Domina : *sigh* No, I suppose not to someone with such a... practical sense of style.

Domina : Why must you be so difficult, Niran? Hand over the prototype, and your bounty disappears. Lifeweaver : Quite surprising that someone in your position doesn't recognize a failed negotiation when she sees one... Domina : Oh, how clever! But just because you've called the game doesn't mean I'll stop playing.
Lúcio : Doesn't matter how many "accidents" you cover up. Rio won't stop fighting to keep Vishkar out of our home! Domina : This is your attempt at resistance? Huh, I hardly noticed.
Domina : Do keep that little noisemaker away from me. I shan't be seen with such an inferior design. Lúcio : Uh, I think you mean, "original design"? Maybe you suits forgot who you stole it from?

Domina : Aren't you going to ask about my favorite little creature? Lúcio : Alright, fine. What's your favorite animal? Domina : Oh, well, I find chinchillas absolutely adorable! And they make the softest coats... Lúcio : *sigh* Yeah. I can see it...

Mauga : How 'bout you and I go rob a place together sometime? Maybe the Louvre? Domina : What do you take me for, a petty thief? Mauga : Hah, we're both stealing, princess! You just do it from a boardroom.

Mauga : You ever drop the whole "corporate" act? Let the mask slip? Domina : "Mask?" I haven't the faintest idea what you mean, Malosi. Mauga : Hey! I know better than most that appearances can be deceiving... Domina : Perhaps your charms are a farce, but I assure you, mine are not.
Mauga : They aren't ready for this! Domina : Remember your inside voice, Malosi. Mauga : This IS my inside voice!

Domina : I've another meeting in Rio de Janeiro, soon. I insist you accompany me. Symmetra : Oh? Will it require another reconstruction? Domina : No, no, Vaswani, that's all been reassigned. The investors simply find your work, uh... "inspiring", for whatever reason.

Domina : You're quite a skilled negotiator, Marzia. I'm impressed. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Domina : Of course. Still rather rugged, though, aren't you? Vendetta : That, I should hope, is readily apparent.

Domina : Do you still perform, Lacroix? I dare say, you'd be captivating on a stage. Widowmaker : Every kill is a performance. Domina : Precisely my point! The public is simply dying to see you at work.
map-specific: Lily von Arx fashions herself Europe's premier real estate mogul, but she's getting on in years. It would be a shame if she... no, perish the thought.
Certainly, I could star in a film. If there were ever a script worthy of me, of course.
Oh! And on my first attempt, no less.
Ugh, much work left to do here. How fortunate that I'm industrious!
